description: A key player's contract is expiring at the end of the season. The GM needs to negotiate and process a contract extension.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the player's current contract details and recent performance data.

expected_outcome.value: Agent has all the necessary background information.

nodes.task_description: Based on performance and market value, generate a competitive contract extension offer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent proposes a 4-year contract extension with a specified salary.

nodes.task_description: Send the offer to the player's agent for negotiation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent formally sends the contract offer.

nodes.task_description: Once agreed upon, generate the final contract for signature.

expected_outcome.value: Agent produces the final legal document.
